description: The Serraino are a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cardeto, Santo Stefano in Aspromonte, and Reggio Calabria, Italy. Originating in the 19th century as part of the 'picciotteria' criminal association, they have monopolized criminal activities in their home areas and expanded across Italy and internationally. Their illicit activities include drug and arms trafficking, with connections in Belgium, Canada, Bolivia, France, United States, Germany, Switzerland, Morocco, Libya, and Syria. They were considered the richest and most powerful family in Milan until the early 2000s.

country_links.evidence_quote: Ma hanno collegamenti molto radicati anche a Milano , dove si sono svolte le operazioni Belgio 1 , Belgio 2 e Belgio 3 che li vedevano coinvolti insieme ad altre cosche...
country_links.context: The Serraino clan has operations in Belgium, as indicated by the 'Belgio 1, Belgio 2 e Belgio 3' operations involving them.

country_links.evidence_quote: All'estero invece sarebbero presenti in 4 continenti e più di una decina di nazioni, di cui: Belgio , Canada , Bolivia , Francia , Stati Uniti d'America , Germania , Svizzera , Marocco , Libia e Siria .
